name: The Back Nine Golf | St George, UT - Sunset Blvd
address: 1397 W Sunset Blvd #105, St. George, UT 84770
about: The Back Nine Golf in St. George offers a premier indoor golf experience on Sunset Blvd. The venue features state-of-the-art simulator bays that allow players to experience world-famous courses or engage in skill-building games and challenges in a comfortable, climate-controlled environment. The atmosphere is designed to be social and inviting, making it a suitable destination for golf enthusiasts looking to practice their swing or groups seeking a unique entertainment option. Guests can expect a modern setting where technology meets leisure, providing a reliable alternative to outdoor play regardless of weather conditions.

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu likely available typical of sim bar model

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not need to bring your own clubs; The Back Nine Golf provides rental clubs for guests.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are typically not permitted as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on the simulators typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers a fun environment for young golfers or families visiting together.
